roa.docketEntryComment: Advisement and Waiver - DUI Advisement of Rights, Waiver, and Plea Form (Second, Third or Fourth Offense)
DEF FILED MOTION FOR REFERRAL TO PRIMARY CAREGIVER DIVERSION

/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 5 Y:PJ 120D/CTS:32/X:BALANCE OF SENTENCE TO BE SERVED ON HOME DETENTION BY ELECTRONIC MONITORING,/PF525 18/MOP1/LREG/LVAL/LCHEM/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP//X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/DEF:ADMITS TWO PRIORDUI OFFENSES, AS FOLLOWS; (1) VC 23103 WITHIN THE MEANING OF VC 23103,5, INALAMEDA COUNTY ON OR ABOUT 09-10-14 AND (2) VC 23152(A), IN CONTRA COSTA COUNTY ON OR BEFORE 02-11-15/ /4019HALF/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON ELECTRONIC MONITORING FOR HOME DETENTION TO BE MANAGED BY THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITHA GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVEST TODAY FOR REMOVAL OF THE SCRAM ALCOHOL MONITORING DEVICE, THE SHERIFF'SDEPARTMENT IS ORDERED TO REMOVE THE SCRAM DEVICE FORTHWITH/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE FOR HOME DETENTION NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 29, 2020/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS PERMITTED TO LEAVE HER HOME FOR THE FOLLOWING PURPOSES:WORK, TAKING HER DAUGHTER TO AND FROM DAYCARE, TAKING HER SERVICE ANIMAL TOPET DAYCARE, MEDICAL APPOINTMENTS, COURT APOPOINTMENTS AND ANYCOURT ORDERED TREATMENT OR OTHER PROGRAMMING/DEF:SHALL PROVIDE THE SFSD WITH A WEEKLY SCHEDULE OF HER MOVEMENT OUTSIDE THE HOME/ /DEF:SHALL CONTACT ALLIANCE ONE TO ESTABLISH A PAYMENT PLAN NO LATER THAN 01-08-21/CCU/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL: TO SET AND PROOF OF SCRAM/X: PROOF OF SCRAM SHOWN/CTORD: DEFENDANT'S SCRAM CONDITIONS ARE MODIFIED TO INCLUDE WORKING AND TRAVELLING FOR THE PURPOSE OUTSIDE OF 50 FILES FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY,  TRAVEL TO INCLUDE TOAND FROM EVENTS FOR EVENT PLANNING PURPOSES,  TIMES VARYDAY TO DAY AND INCLUDES TRAVEL OUTSIDE OF 50 FILES FROM THE COUNTY AND IS ACCEPTABLE/CONTD:PRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE AND STATUS OF MVARS/SB: 2 HOURS WITH NO SCRAM VIOLATIONS/

/CAL  ARRAIGNMENT/DAWT/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/OR/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF O,R,, DEFENDANT TO HAVE SCRAM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TO SET AND PROOF OF SCRAM/DOPC/
/CAL:CHANGE OF PLEA REFERRED FROM DEPARTMENT 17/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITIO
/CAL:MOTION FOR PRIMARY CARE DIVERSION/MO DENIED/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/SB:2HR/
/CAL:STATUS OF PRIMARY CARE DIVERSION/CONTD:MOTION FOR PRIMARY CARE DIVERSION/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL & STATUS OF MVARS/CONTD:STATUS OF PC DIVERSION/SB:2 HOUR/
